message:
refactor: remove deprecated gt-prefix role bead ID functions (gt-4p791p.7)

Remove RoleBeadID() and per-role helpers (DogRoleBeadID, MayorRoleBeadID,
etc.) from beads_role.go. These used the wrong gt- prefix; the canonical
hq- prefix variants in agent_ids.go (RoleBeadIDTown and friends) are the
correct API. AllRoleBeadDefs() already used the Town variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
